title: Revenue Leak Map /book diagnostic-first conversion path (qualified -> calendar)
description: End-to-end user-impact test of the warm /book funnel: a real-browser visitor taps through the 7-signal diagnostic, is captured with email + business only (no phone), is classified against the ICP floor, and — when qualified — is routed to the booking calendar with a continuation token that opens the full Map and the prefilled booking.
persona: Owner-led service business, decision-maker, $3M-$8M, ad-spend ready, burned by an agency (ICP-qualifying).

steps.expect: diagnostic-first /book renders (book-diagnostic, 'of 07', single h1, 3 proof tiles); NOT the legacy 16-field QualifierForm.
each tap advances; Growth Index builds.
capture asks email + business name ONLY (no phone field); honeypots website/company_url present + empty.

handler returns { ok:true, classification:'qualified', route:'calendar', reason:'qualified_icp', tier_routing:'ascend', signals:{ revenue_floor:'met', ad_spend_signal:'ready', decision_authority:'decision_maker', agency_history_signal:'burned_by_agencies_positive' } }; frontend routes STATE=calendar.
R1 continuation token minted + stamped on contact; confirmation email constructed (subject personalized) with token + booking_event_id; Map kickoff writes audit_submissions; team alert fires.
generator cron (~5min) produces the scored Map (audit_funnel_state.audit_status='delivered'); delivery email 'Your Revenue Leak Map is ready' carries the tokened ?ct= Map link + unsub.
delivered ?ct= owner token opens the FULL Map; no-token / wrong-owner / expired token -> teaser (no cross-lead leak).

pass_criteria: classification == 'qualified' && route == 'calendar' on the deployed handler
capture collects email + business only, no phone
continuation token present on contact + delivery email
owner-token Map response strictly larger than the teaser (un-gated)
wrong-owner and no-token both return the teaser
